subcodes.first_line: O divine companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Think not that this heart hath any attachment to aught save the countenance of the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی عبدالبهاء گمان مفرمااید که این دل تعلق بگلی جز روی یاران دارد
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement
